lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Do you have any quests for me? I really want one. I really want to help out!

lines.speaker: Dimintheis
lines.text: My family consider what you did for us a great service. We couldn't possibly trouble you further.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: There must be SOMETHING you need help with. I am a great adventurer after all.

lines.speaker: Dimintheis
lines.text: There really isn't anything, I am very content with life right now.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I guess money really does buy happiness.

lines.speaker: Dimintheis
lines.text: What was that? I didn't quite catch that.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Nothing...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh come on, surely there's something I can help out with! I want to help, however menial it is.

lines.speaker: Dimintheis
lines.text: Okay okay. Fine then. Whilst I don't have anything for you, how about you try my sons, they are always wanting something done.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Fantastic! I'll get straight to it!

lines.speaker: Dimintheis
lines.text: Have you spoke to Avan, Caleb and Johnathon yet?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Nope, not yet!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello there Avan, I've had a bit of spare time lately, and I was wondering whether you had anything I could help you out with, like a quest or something?

lines.speaker: Avan
lines.text: Honestly [player name], everything is fantastic! What you did for me and my family is amazing. My lady was very impressed with the perfect jewellery you obtained for me!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You know, I really have a LOT of spare time right now. Anything, I will help out with anything.

lines.speaker: Avan
lines.text: I couldn't bring myself to trouble you any further [player name]. Thank you for everything, but I am content.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Very well, I'll go and see if your other brothers need anything...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I do one quest for you all and it solves all of your problems? Amazing... I'll go and tell your father how happy you all are!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Are you absolutely sure there is nothing I can help you out with?

lines.speaker: Avan
lines.text: Look, I really just want to get on with my life, your insistence on wanting another quest is getting annoying!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Caleb! As an adventurer, I am ready to help you with whatever you need... again! What can I help you with?

lines.speaker: Caleb
lines.text: ... and that's when I found the broken lamping stick. Maybe you could help me investigate?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sorry, I didn't quite catch that, my mind was erm... elsewhere.

lines.speaker: Caleb
lines.text: Well if you aren't going to listen to the problem, it's fine, don't worry about it. Nothing an experienced chef can't solve himself!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm sorry! Please let me help.

lines.speaker: Caleb
lines.text: No! Not every problem in my life needs an adventurer to come solve it for me anyway. I'm happy and there's nothing else either!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Very well, I'll go and see if your other brothers need anything...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I do one quest for you all and it solves all of your problems? Amazing... I'll go and tell your father how happy you all are!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Are you sure there's nothing I can do, a chef can always do with help in their kitchen right?

lines.speaker: Caleb
lines.text: I'm a very competent cook! I do not need your assistance [player name]. Please leave me be.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I killed demons, I cured your poison and restored your family's honour! What can I help you with next Johnathon?

lines.speaker: Johnathon
lines.text: Actually, come to think of it...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes...

lines.speaker: Johnathon
lines.text: I've been having this issue. You see the lady I seek is trapped up the top of a very large tower of a very large castle, and has been for all of her life so far.

lines.speaker: Johnathon
lines.text: There is but one problem, a fierce dragon circles the castle, breathing fire at anyone who dares go near.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: This is sounding like a great opportunity to be heroic, shall I go get her for you?

lines.speaker: Johnathon
lines.text: Ha ha! You would believe anything. That was just a children's story!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Very funny Johnathon, I can't help but laugh...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So do you actually have any problems I can help you with?

lines.speaker: Johnathon
lines.text: Everything is fantastic [player name]! You adventurers really do seem to love quests, but I do not have one for you today.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Very well, I'll go and see if your other brothers need anything...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I do one quest for you all and it solves all of your problems? Amazing... I'll go and tell your father how happy you all are!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Are you sure there's nothing I can do, perhaps even teach you about Death Rune magicks, where your skills do not live up to mine.

lines.speaker: Johnathon
lines.text: I find that very insulting [player name]. You do not need to remind me of your superior skills. Leave me be.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I have been and spoken to Avan, Caleb and Johnathon and none of them need anything from me!

lines.speaker: Dimintheis
lines.text: That is excellent news [player name]. It's good to hear they are doing well.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yeah... you're welcome.

lines.speaker: Dimintheis
lines.text: Come to think of it, there is something you can help me out with!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes! I accept your quest!

lines.speaker: Dimintheis
lines.text: Slow down. I haven't told you what it is yet!

lines.speaker: Dimintheis
lines.text: I need 500,000 coins. Can you help me out with that?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You just want coins?! Aren't you wealthy! Why do you need coins from me?

lines.speaker: Dimintheis
lines.text: Okay, I suppose there will be no time better than this to tell you the truth.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Go on...

lines.speaker: Dimintheis
lines.text: Our family just pretends to be rich [player name]. We gave ourselves a fancy surname, pretended the gauntlets are a family heirloom and asked adventurers to solve our family issues.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Wait, so all of this was for nothing? You just lied to me!

lines.speaker: Dimintheis
lines.text: No no, your work was indeed very helpful, the crest is important to us, it helps to portray that we are indeed wealthy, despite the fact we are not.

lines.speaker: Dimintheis
lines.text: I mean, if you were wealthy, would you live in a tiny house in the darkest corner of Varrock? Not a chance. This is your chance to do us a final favour, may I have 500,000 coins from you?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I don't have enough coins on me.

lines.speaker: Dimintheis
lines.text: Thank you very much. In appreciation, I will inform Avan, Caleb and Johnathon that you did yet another great deed for the family, and that you would find more pairs of those gauntlets useful.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well this didn't feel very heroic...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You don't need 500,000 coins from me! I don't believe you! You can keep your rewards.

lines.speaker: Dimintheis
lines.text: I will be here if you change your mind.

sections.title: Talking to Dimintheis again before handing out the money

lines.speaker: Dimintheis
lines.text: I need 500,000 coins. Can you help me out with that?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You just want coins?! Aren't you wealthy! Why do you need coins from me?

lines.speaker: Dimintheis
lines.text: Okay, I suppose there will be no time better than this to tell you the truth.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Go on...

lines.speaker: Dimintheis
lines.text: Our family just pretends to be rich [player name]. We gave ourselves a fancy surname, pretended the gauntlets are a family heirloom and asked adventurers to solve our family issues.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Wait, so all of this was for nothing? You just lied to me!

lines.speaker: Dimintheis
lines.text: No no, your work was indeed very helpful, the crest is important to us, it helps to portray that we are indeed wealthy, despite the fact we are not.

lines.speaker: Dimintheis
lines.text: I mean, if you were wealthy, would you live in a tiny house in the darkest corner of Varrock? Not a chance. This is your chance to do us a final favour, may I have 500,000 coins from you?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello Dimintheis.

lines.speaker: Dimintheis
lines.text: I will not forget what you did for my family [player name]. Those 500,000 coins have allowed us to put food on the table.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: That's no problem.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Anyway, I was wondering if I could get more of those gauntlets?

lines.speaker: Dimintheis
lines.text: You may, but you'll have to ask my sons for them, unless you just want a pair of the Steel gauntlets.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes, I do want a pair of steel gauntlets please.

lines.speaker: Dimintheis
lines.text: Here you go.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No thanks Dimintheis.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I thought these gauntlets were a family heirloom, how come you have several of them?

lines.speaker: Dimintheis
lines.text: I'm sorry for lying to you [player name], it was just all part of the ploy to make our family seem wealthy.

lines.speaker: Dimintheis
lines.text: They're not heirlooms at all, we have crates full of the things hidden away in the basement.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: And you still think that these are an acceptable reward for what I have done for your family?

lines.speaker: Dimintheis
lines.text: It's all I have to give...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Very well, I do admit, they are useful.

lines.speaker: Avan
lines.text: I have received word from my father that you assisted us again! I get the feeling you weren't going to stop trying until you did though.

lines.speaker: Avan
lines.text: As a token of my appreciation, I will happily forge you as many pairs of Goldsmith gauntlets as you desire.

lines.speaker: Avan
lines.text: You will find the rate you gain experience when smelting gold much improved whilst wearing these gauntlets.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thank you.

lines.speaker: Caleb
lines.text: I have received word from my father that you assisted us again! I get the feeling you weren't going to stop trying until you did though.

lines.speaker: Caleb
lines.text: As thanks, I'll provide you with as many pairs of Cooking gauntlets as you wish.

lines.speaker: Caleb
lines.text: You will find the rate you burn certain foods is much reduced whilst wearing these gauntlets.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thank you.

lines.speaker: Johnathon
lines.text: I have received word from my father that you assisted us again! I get the feeling you weren't going to stop trying until you did though.

lines.speaker: Johnathon
lines.text: If you want, I'll provide you with as many pairs of Chaos gauntlets as you wish to say thanks!

lines.speaker: Johnathon
lines.text: You will find the power of bolt spells increases substantially whilst wearing these gauntlets.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thank you.
